web_results.title: 2026 Iran–United States crisis - Wikipedia
web_results.description: Trump has sent warships, tankers and submarines to the Middle East to be ready for potential strikes as soon as 21 February, sources told CBS. In the final week of January, President Donald Trump used Truth Social to issue a series of public warnings directed at Iran, marking one of the most visible escalations in U.S. messaging during the crisis. On 28 January 2026, Trump declared that "a massive Armada is heading to Iran", describing it as moving "with great power, enthusiasm, and purpose."

web_results.title: 2025–2026 Iran–United States negotiations - Wikipedia
web_results.description: The United States also carried out a series of strikes on Iranian nuclear sites, negotiations between the United States and Iran were subsequently suspended. They resumed in early 2026 after large-scale protests in Iran. Meanwhile, the U.S. military buildup in the Middle East as a threat of ...

web_results.title: US strikes Iran by...? Trading Odds & Predictions | Polymarket
web_results.description: If you buy "Yes" shares at 72¢ and the outcome is correct, you receive $1.00 per share — a profit of 28¢ per share. If incorrect, those shares are worth $0. The "US strikes Iran by...?" market is scheduled to resolve on or around Jun 30, 2026.

web_results.title: Exclusive: US military preparing for potentially weeks-long Iran operations | Reuters
web_results.description: Experts say the risks to U.S. forces would be far greater in such an operation against Iran, which boasts a formidable arsenal of missiles. Retaliatory Iranian strikes also increase the risk of a regional conflict.

web_results.description: The crisis unfolded against the backdrop of Iran's deepening economic collapse and internal unrest, which had begun in late 2025 and continued into early 2026. news_results.title: US re-asserts 2025 strikes ‘obliterated’ Iran’s nuclear programme | Politics News | Al Jazeera
news_results.description: The White House comment comes after a senior Trump aide said Iran is a week away from having material for nuclear bomb.

news_results.description: Iran is seeking support from US adversaries Russia and the People’s Republic of China (PRC) to prepare for war against the United States.
